summary: Overhauled flowRibbonField with long sweeping curves and cinematic depth fade. Changed trail length from 12 to 100 points per ribbon with fewer sources (max ~30), widened source radius (2.0-5.0), reduced advection step to 0.18 with higher frequencies for smoother spread. Added aTrailProgress attribute (0→1 per ribbon) registered as optional in shaderRegistry. Vertex shader: bass now drives macro curve amplitude via (0.3 + uBassEnergy * 0.7) scaling, treble modulates ribbon thickness via (0.6 + uTrebleEnergy * 0.8) point size factor, increased atmospheric decay to 0.12. Fragment shader: trail-progress tail fade via smoothstep, increased fog alpha attenuation from 0.85 to 0.92. Widened uFogFar default from 8.0 to 10.0, increased uBasePointSize scaling from 0.08 to 0.10. All 43 tests pass, build succeeds.
